arts.ttl: Derby County v Luton injury latest as major blow confirmed with trio ruled out
arts.sum: Derby head coach Paul Warne does have some injury problems to contend with and will be without three players for the trip to Kenilworth Road with the latest addition to the treatment table being Eiran Cashin. Here is the very latest from the treatment table as the Rams prepare for a stiff examination against a Luton side who have been good at home this season.
